description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a global before_script 'bash .gitlab-ci.sh' and defines the variables MYSQL_DATABASE=project_name and MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=secret. Add a phpunit:php7.1:mysql5.7 job that runs in the default test stage using the php:7.1 Docker image with a mysql:5.7 service. In that job execute the command 'php vendor/bin/phpunit --colors'. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are configured, so the job runs on all branches.
